query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO kc_library (kc_id, name, domain, jurisdiction, category, authority_type, authority_cite, authority_notes, tags) VALUES
('CIV_CA_FRAUD_INTENTIONAL', 'Fraud / Intentional Misrepresentation (Deceit)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Fraud', 'statute', 'Cal. Civ. Code §§ 1709–1710', 'Deceit definitions; elements largely common-law formatted in CA pattern instructions.', 'fraud,misrepresentation,commercial'),
('CIV_CA_FRAUD_NEGLIGENT_MISREP', 'Negligent Misrepresentation', 'civil', 'CA', 'Fraud', 'common_law', NULL, 'CA common law; map using standard misrep template.', 'fraud,misrepresentation'),
('CIV_CA_FRAUD_CONCEALMENT', 'Fraud by Concealment / Nondisclosure', 'civil', 'CA', 'Fraud', 'common_law', 'Cal. Civ. Code § 1710(3) (supporting)', 'Duty to disclose varies by relationship/context.', 'fraud,concealment'),
('CIV_CA_UCL_17200', 'Unfair Competition Law (UCL)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Consumer / Unfair Competition', 'statute', 'Bus. & Prof. Code § 17200', 'Unlawful / unfair / fraudulent prongs; standing & remedies limits apply.', 'UCL,consumer,business'),
('CIV_CA_FAL_17500', 'False Advertising Law (FAL)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Consumer / Advertising', 'statute', 'Bus. & Prof. Code § 17500', 'Advertising/marketing misrepresentation.', 'advertising,consumer'),
('CIV_CA_CLRA_1750', 'Consumers Legal Remedies Act (CLRA)', 'civil', 'CA', 'Consumer', 'statute', 'Cal. Civ. Code § 1750 et seq.', 'Consumer transactions; notice requirements may apply.', 'consumer,clra');
